case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS LEE, MARCUS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, MARCUS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-26-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-26-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-28-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-28-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-27-2002 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, MARCUS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,026.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
